title: Create: For Science!
description: CFS is a Create addon that adds technology based on, inspired by, or even just straight-up ripped from fiction! It features useful gadgets, technology and other items in the name of inventing!
body:
_**Create: For Science!**_


CFS is a Create addon that adds technology based on, inspired by, or even just straight-up ripped from fiction! It features useful gadgets, technology and other items in the name of inventing!

So far, the addon adds:
- The Resonite Screwdriver, a tool that can activate redstone
- Resonite, a special crystal with redstone properties
- Copper Roundels, a light block that fades on
- Tungsten
- A heavy Tungsten Cube entity, like the cubes from Portal
- The food cube!
and a strange interaction between nether portals and buckets... hmm.

Join the discord!
https://discord.gg/ar6WtA9n8Z
